commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Feishu media URL SecretRef resolution before loading/uploading media and extends Feishu media/outbound tests for SecretRef media and fallback redaction.

PR surface: Source +99, Tests +164. Total +263 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source for the review finding: the patch resolves a `mediaUrl` payload string through SecretRef runtime before `loadWebMedia`. For the linked Feishu tenant bug, the issue has concrete steps but I did not run a live Feishu/Keychain repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Draft external PR with missing real proof and a security-sensitive solution-direction blocker needs contributor rework or maintainer direction before any repair/merge automation.

target.title: fix(feishu): resolve SecretRef media before upload
target.body:
## Summary
- resolve Feishu media SecretRef inputs before media loading and upload routing
- resolve payload/native-card media URLs before sending follow-up cards
- avoid exposing SecretRef media values in comment-thread fallback text or upload-failure link fallback

Fixes #89338.

## Validation
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/feishu/src/media.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/outbound.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-utils.secret-resolution.test.ts
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test.tsbuildinfo
target.author: pluviobyte

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
